title: UniBond AERO 360° Moisture Absorber Wildflower Meadow Refill Tab, Aromatherapy, Ultra-Absorbent and Odour-Neutralising, for AERO 360° Dehumidifier, Condensation Absorbers, Twin Pack (2 x 450g)
features: Moisture & odour control – The AERO 360° moisture absorber and the UniBond AERO 360 refill tabs offer a simple solution to effectively absorb excess moisture and to neutralise bad smells in your home.
2-in-1 – Patented wave-shaped UniBond refill tab made of ultra-absorbent crystals for advanced moisture absorption, patented anti-odour technology and a floral scent of sun-kissed wildflowers.

Long-Lasting – One UniBond AERO 360 moisture absorber refill tab lasts from 1 to 3 months in normal room conditions depending on temperature and humidity.The vitalising wildflower meadow scent creates a special ambiance in your home.
Universal use – The UniBond AERO 360° damp absorber refill tabs easily fit into almost all humidity absorber devices with a capacity of at least 450g.
Package Contents – UniBond AERO 360° Moisture Absorber Wildflower Meadow Refill Tab, highly efficient moisture absorption, 2 x 450g refills for the AERO 360° or almost all ≥ 450g capacity devices
description: Product Description Long-lasting and efficient moisture control with the UniBond AERO 360° Moisture Absorber Refill Tabs! With innovative 2-in-1 technology, AERO 360° odour neutraliser refill tabs absorb excess moisture, neutralise bad smells and create a special ambiance at home with the sweet and fragrant wildflower meadow scent. The patented wave-shape with ultra-absorbent active crystals and patented anti-odour agents help prevent damp problems such as condensation, mould and musty smells to create a healthy indoor climate. The delicate scent of wildflowers with precious essential oils invokes summery green fields full of wildflowers, reviving your home with a great outdoor feeling. Best used in combination with the AERO 360° Moisture Absorber to ensure long-lasting and optimal performance! This set of 2 AERO 360° refill tabs is compatible with most moisture absorbers with a capacity of at least 450g. To use: 1.a. AERO standard: Push the “OPEN” button on top of the device. 1.b. AERO Bathroom: Press the PUSH buttons on the hood to lift up the hood from the device. 2. Open the UniBond dehumidifier refill tab packaging. 3. Place the tab with the blue side facing downwards on top of the axis and close the device. 4. Once the water in the tank reaches the refill level, open the spout and empty the water into the toilet. The Product Benefits at a Glance: 2-in-1: controls moisture & neutralises odours Floral, vitalising wildflower scent with essential oils Advanced moisture absorption with ultra-absorbent crystals Patented wave-shape design for optimal efficiency Patented anti-odour technology Long-lasting: refills last 1 to 3 months in normal room conditions depending on temperature & humidity Format: 2 x 450g Wildflower Meadow Refill Tabs Manufacturer Contact Information Henkel Ltd, Road 5, Winsford, Cheshire, CW7 3QY. Henkel Ireland Distribution Ltd, Dublin, D24 YH42.
